# Packaged options

The option keys accepted by {py:class}`~breos.App` config dicts, generated
from the packaged data files and source constants. The same lists are
available at the command line via `breos list <category>` (add `--json` for
machine-readable output).

Packaged presets exist to make BREOS runnable out of the box. For a real
study, review [Required Inputs](inputs.md) and replace the assumptions that
matter to your project.

## Locations

Preset keys for the `location` config key, from `breos/data/configs/locations.json`. Any other site works with a coordinate dict — see [Recipes](recipes.md).

| Key | Name | Latitude | Longitude | Timezone |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| `berlin` | Berlin, Germany | 52.52 | 13.405 | `Europe/Berlin` |
| `erlangen` | Erlangen, Germany | 49.5897 | 11.0078 | `Europe/Berlin` |
| `esposende` | Esposende, Portugal | 41.5333 | -8.7833 | `Europe/Lisbon` |
| `lisbon` | Lisbon, Portugal | 38.7223 | -9.1393 | `Europe/Lisbon` |
| `madrid` | Madrid, Spain | 40.4168 | -3.7038 | `Europe/Madrid` |
| `melbourne` | Melbourne, City of Melbourne, Victoria, Australia | -37.8142454 | 144.9631732 | `Australia/Melbourne` |
| `porto` | Porto, Portugal | 41.1579 | -8.6291 | `Europe/Lisbon` |

## PV modules

Catalogue keys for the `pv_module` config key, from `breos.pv_modules.MODULES`.

| Key | Power (W) | Name | Cell type |
|---|---|---|---|
| `Erlangen_445W` | 445 | Erlangen_445W | monoSi |
| `Generic_400W` | 400 | Generic 400W (LONGi LR4-72HPH-400M ref) | monoSi |
| `Generic_600W_Bifacial` | 600 | Generic 600W bifacial (utility-scale ref) | monoSi |
| `Suntech_STP550S_STC` | 550 | Suntech_STP550S-C72/Vmh | monoSi |

## Cost presets

Preset keys for the `cost_preset` config key, from `breos/data/configs/costs.json`. Editable copies live in `configs/base/`.

| Key | Buy (EUR/kWh) | Export (EUR/kWh) | Battery (EUR/kWh) |
|---|---|---|---|
| `residential_de` | 0.4042 | 0.079 | 500 |
| `residential_es` | 0.2841 | 0.08 | 500 |
| `residential_pt` | 0.2582 | 0.04 | 500 |

## Load profiles

Keys for the `load_profile` config key, from `breos.load_profiles.PROFILE_NAMES`. Non-bundled profiles need their source CSVs supplied through `rlp_directory` — see [Load Profile Data](../legal/load-profile-data.md) for expected filenames and licensing notes. The `bdew_h0` alias maps to the bundled demandlib-shaped H0 example; direct BDEW H0 2025 is key `7` and requires an external CSV.

| Key | Name | Aliases | Bundled |
|---|---|---|---|
| `1` | H0SLP (demandlib) | `bdew_h0, crest, default, demandlib_h0, h0` | yes |
| `4` | E-Redes 2025 - BTN A (external file required) | — | no |
| `5` | E-Redes 2025 - BTN B (external file required) | — | no |
| `6` | E-Redes 2025 - BTN C (external file required) | `eredes_btn_c` | no |
| `7` | BDEW H0 2025 (external file required) | — | no |
| `8` | REE 2026 - 2.0TD (external file required) | `ree_2.0td` | no |
